title: Image optimization: Replace loadImage with ThumbnailCache + NSCache
description: Remove full-resolution loadImage(named:) from ThreadDetailView and replace all image loading with the downsampling ThumbnailCache. Swap ThumbnailCache backing store from plain dictionary to NSCache for automatic memory eviction. Refactor the edit flow to track existing photos by fileName instead of loading full UIImages.

title: Swap ThumbnailCache from Dict to NSCache
description: Replace the plain [String: UIImage] dictionary in ThumbnailCache actor with NSCache<NSString, UIImage>. NSCache auto-evicts under memory pressure, preventing unbounded growth. Set a reasonable countLimit (e.g. 100).

title: Refactor edit flow to track existing photos by fileName
description: Replace loadedImages-based edit flow with fileName tracking. Add existingPhotoFileNames: [String] state to ThreadDetailView. startEditing populates fileNames instead of loading full UIImages. updateEntry keeps existing fileNames and only saves genuinely new images. Eliminates the slow .pngData() equality comparison.

title: Update input bar to show existing photos via ThumbnailView
description: Update the input bar image preview section to render existingPhotoFileNames using ThumbnailView (downsampled) alongside newly picked UIImages. Remove loadImage(named:) function entirely from ThreadDetailView.

title: Mindmap: Grape integration for thought visualization
description: Add a force-directed graph mindmap using SwiftGraphs/Grape to visualize connections between threads and entries. Local-first, native SwiftUI approach.

title: Add Grape SPM dependency to Xcode project
description: Add SwiftGraphs/Grape (https://github.com/swiftgraphs/Grape) as a Swift Package Manager dependency. Verify it builds successfully.

title: Design graph data model for mindmap nodes and edges
description: Create SwiftData models or extend existing models to represent graph nodes (threads/entries) and edges (connections). Include position persistence for pinned layouts.

title: Build basic MindMapView with Grape force-directed layout
description: Create a MindMapView using Grape's ForceDirectedGraph. Render threads as nodes and connections as edges. Support pan and zoom gestures.

title: Wire MindMapView into app navigation
description: Add mindmap as a new tab or entry point in the app. Integrate with existing navigation patterns.

title: Add tap-to-open interaction on mindmap nodes
description: Tapping a node in the mindmap navigates to the corresponding ThreadDetailView. Show node labels (thread titles).

title: Add edge editing: create and delete connections
description: Allow users to create new connections between threads (long-press or gesture) and delete existing ones. Persist edges in SwiftData.

title: Persist and restore node positions for stable layout
description: Save pinned node positions to SwiftData so the mindmap looks consistent between app launches. Add optional re-layout button.
